title: Latest update
excerpt:
A latest update column that shows the most recent update so a project manager can view the most recent comment for projects without having to click into the update for each item.

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml:
A latest update column that shows the most recent update so a project manager can view the most recent comment for projects without having to click into the update for each item.

I imagine it working like Smartsheet’s latest comment field:

help.smartsheet.com

Add a latest comment column | Smartsheet Learning Center

Add the latest comment column to your sheet

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: Figured out that we could do this through workflows in Monday.com! So having a dedicated column is lower priority now.
